I'm talking about massive audiences that you can spend Five ten up to fifty thousand dollars a day on So the first thing that I would test are in market audiences And these are really just audiences that google knows are in the market for that particular sector Or service. So when you go and search how to get a mortgage Google is recording this and will now start to show you ads all over for mortgages So you can literally go into the audiences when you're setting this up and you can choose In market audiences for people searching For mortgages and these people are generally Usually in the market to buy and they perform a lot better than, you know, broader audiences like topics and interests So some of the first things that will roll out is in market The second thing will roll out is custom intent audiences and this allows you to put together an audience That's been visiting, you know, all of your competitors websites or searching for keywords related To your niche. So you really want to take the top 50 competitors or keywords and dump them into a custom intent audience And custom intent audiences Have been able to scale the most for us And we've spent up to 40 000 dollars a day on one custom intent audience

## [39:44 - 42:48]

## [45:51 - 48:53]

Okay, they just won't run because google doesn't have any data to optimize offer So you you can really roll out maximize conversions And then you can dupe out that campaign or you could just even switch it over to target cpa After you start getting something to roll now if you have something where you're expecting a cost per acquisition of 100 Dollars and you don't want to spend, you know six grand to get that you can move the conversion Up in the funnel so you can get this 60 to 75 conversions a little bit quicker So that might be you know add to carts or that might be Scrolling 25 of the page But if you're new to google ads you need to give them data in order to In order to work So How do you actually optimize youtube ads so when we roll something out we will have a campaign So let's just say it's going to be in market audiences um You know advertising and marketing and then we will have ad groups for every single device So one ad group will be desktop one ad group will be mobile one ad group will be tablet And essentially all you're doing is you're just um if you want to just target desktop You would go into the devices and you would set up a negative 100 percent bid for mobile and tablet and you would do the same for that and then we allow things to run up to three x Target cpa. So if we want leads for 10 dollars We let the ad group run up to 30 dollars before we make a decision on whether or not to turn it off The next thing that we're actually going to optimize is the videos So we we optimize for the actual ads Second and generally you're going to have three to five ads in each ad group now sometimes google will actually lock onto one ad And if it's not hitting your your target cost proposition simply turn it off and it will start to um Give the budget to the uh other videos Then you want to optimize your demographics.
